#### `circleci mcp stream [flags]`

Stream the MCP server over HTTP

| Flag                 | Description                             |
| -------------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `--host string`      | host to listen on                       |
| `--log-level string` | Log level (debug, info, warn, error)    |
| `--port int`         | port number to listen on (default 8080) |
